allow: Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/generate -H "content-type: application/json" -d "{\\"resume\\":\\"test resume\\",\\"jobDescription\\":\\"test job\\"}" -o /tmp/gen.out -w "HTTP %{http_code}\\n")

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/generate -H "content-type: application/json" -d "{\\"resume\\":\\"Jane Doe. 5 years Python and ML engineering at Acme. Built a fraud-detection pipeline that cut false positives 40%. BS CS.\\",\\"jobDescription\\":\\"Senior ML Engineer at FinTech Co. Looking for Python, fraud detection experience, ability to ship.\\",\\"company\\":\\"FinTech Co\\",\\"role\\":\\"Senior ML Engineer\\",\\"tone\\":\\"conversational\\",\\"length\\":\\"concise\\"}" --max-time 60 -o /tmp/letter.txt -w "HTTP %{http_code}\\n")
